use_cases: Display processing or loading states in tech dashboards with animated glitch effects
Show system status indicators in developer tool interfaces
Create engaging loading cards for SaaS applications
Add visual interest to background processing notifications
ai_summary: A card component featuring a canvas-based glitch animation with color-shifting letter effects. Displays a processing state with continuous motion animation using interpolated blue/purple gradient colors. The component uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and creates a tech-forward aesthetic suitable for dashboards, dev tools, and SaaS platforms requiring visual feedback during background operations.
